question:
白蟻主要分為幾大類別？
How many main categories are termites divided into?

以下哪類白蟻對建築物結構破壞最低？
Which type of termite causes the least damage to building structures?

濕木白蟻和乾木白蟻主要在哪裡築巢？
Where do dampwood and drywood termites mainly nest?
options: 在木材內 Within wood itself
在地基裂縫 In foundation cracks
在管道空隙 In plumbing voids

question:
濕木白蟻和乾木白蟻的糞粒呈什麼形狀？
What shape are the fecal pellets of dampwood/drywood termites?

土棲性白蟻主要在哪裡築巢？
Where do subterranean termites mainly nest?
options: 在地上或泥土內 On/In ground

question:
以下哪種白蟻是香港最常見到的？
Which type of termite is most commonly encountered in Hong Kong?

「黃翅大白蟻」的學名是什麼？
What is the scientific name of "Macrotermes barneyi"?

最適合白蟻生存的溫度為攝氏多少度？
What is the optimum temperature range for termite existence?

白蟻可以存活的溫度範圍是？
What temperature range can termites survive in?

現存白蟻種類多於多少種？
How many termite species exist?

約有多少種白蟻會破壞人類木材結構而被定為害蟲？
Approximately how many termite species are pests of wooden structures?

家白蟻（台灣乳白蟻）在全球白蟻品種中排名第幾？
How aggressive is Formosan termite globally?

家白蟻（台灣乳白蟻）屬於哪類白蟻？
What category does Formosan termite belong to?

家白蟻（台灣乳白蟻）有什麼特別之處？
What is special about Formosan termite?
options: 牠們不需要與泥土接觸也能生存 Can exist without soil contact
牠們只吃乾燥木材 Only eat dry wood
牠們不善於築巢 Poor at nest building
牠們壽命最短 Shortest lifespan

question:
白蟻屬於什麼類型的動物？
What type of animal is a termite?

白蟻必須做什麼才能生長？
What must termites do to grow?

白蟻被列為什麼類型的昆蟲？
Termites are classified as:

一個白蟻群體內有以下哪些不同崗位？
Which positions exist in a termite colony?
options: 只有工蟻和兵蟻 Only workers and soldiers
蟻后、蟻王、工蟻、兵蟻、飛蟻 Queen, King, Workers, Soldiers, Alates
只有蟻后和工蟻 Only queen and workers

question:
蟻王在白蟻群體內扮演什麼角色？
What role does the termite king play?
options: 協助築造交配房間及餵養若蟲 Assist in nest building and brood rearing
不參與群體活動 No colony involvement

question:
白蟻蟻后的壽命可達多少年？
How long can a termite queen live?

白蟻蟻后每日能生產約多少蟻卵？
Approximately how many eggs does a termite queen produce per day?

白蟻工蟻長約多少毫米？
Approximately how long is a termite worker (mm)?

白蟻工蟻能離開巢穴多遠覓食？
How far can termite workers forage from the colony?

白蟻兵蟻長約多少毫米？
Approximately how long is a termite soldier (mm)?

白蟻兵蟻的主要職責是什麼？
What is the main duty of termite soldiers?
options: 攻擊入侵者和保護巢穴 Fight predators and secure colony

question:
白蟻兵蟻受到騷擾時會發出什麼聲音作為警號？
What sound do termite soldiers emit when disturbed?
options: 「嘀、嘀、嘀…」的聲音 "Tick, tick, tick…" sound

question:
白蟻群體發展到多少年後才會出現飛蟻（生殖蟻）？
After how many years does a termite colony produce alates?

飛蟻（白蟻）的飛行能力如何？
How good are termite alates at flying?
options: 非常善於飛行 Excellent fliers
不善飛行 Not strong fliers
完全不能飛行 Cannot fly at all
只在夜間飛行 Only fly at night

question:
白蟻由以下哪些隱蔽位置進入居所？
Which hidden locations do termites use to enter properties?
options: 只有地基裂縫 Only foundation cracks
地基裂縫、管道空隙、伸縮縫、水泥磚 Only (1)(2)(3)
地基裂縫、管道空隙、伸縮縫、水泥磚、分飛現象 All of above

question:
白蟻泥路（蟻路）的主要作用是什麼？
What is the main function of termite mud tubes?
options: 保持活動範圍內的溫度和濕度 Regulate temperature and moisture
作為繁殖場所 Breeding ground
驅逐其他昆蟲 Repel other insects

question:
在窗邊及露台位置發現很多白蟻翅膀表示什麼？
Finding many termite wings near windows/balconies indicates:
options: 白蟻即將死亡 Termites about to die
附近有白蟻巢穴 There is a termite colony in/near premises
白蟻不活動 Termites not active
需要噴灑殺蟲劑 Need to spray insecticide

question:
如客人發現白蟻入侵，下列做法哪一項是正確的？
What should a client do if they find termite infestation?
options: 立即噴灑家用殺蟲劑 Immediately spray home-use insecticide
騷擾入侵痕跡及噴灑殺蟲劑 Disturb signs and spray
不要騷擾痕跡、不要噴任何殺蟲劑、儘快致電專業滅蟲公司 Don't disturb, don't spray, call professional ASAP

question:
為什麼不應該騷擾白蟻入侵痕跡？
Why should termite infestation signs NOT be disturbed?
options: 因為白蟻非常聰明，有機會離開被騷擾的地方 Termites are smart and may spread
因為會殺死所有白蟻 Will kill all termites
因為沒有影響 No effect
因為白蟻會變得更強 Termites become stronger

question:
Sentricon（心居康）是什麼？
What is Sentricon?
options: 一種液體殺蟲劑 A liquid insecticide
一個白蟻族群撲治系統 A termite colony elimination system
一種生物控制方法 A biological control method
一種物理屏障 A physical barrier

question:
Sentricon 系統的主要有效成分是多少？
What is the active ingredient percentage in Sentricon?

Sentricon 的有效成分名稱是什麼？
What is the name of the active ingredient in Sentricon?

Noviflumuron 屬於哪一類物質？
What class of substance is Noviflumuron?
options: 昆蟲生長調節劑 (IGR) Insect growth regulator

question:
Sentricon 系統如何導致白蟻巢被撲治？
How does Sentricon eliminate the termite colony?
options: 直接毒死所有白蟻 Directly poison all termites
透過控制幾丁質導致蛻皮失敗，使整巢白蟻被撲治 Control chitin causes stop molting, whole colony eliminated

question:
在地面（IG）藥餌站放置在什麼位置？
Where are In-Ground (IG) bait stations placed?
options: 在泥土中，圍繞被保護結構的周邊 In soil around perimeter of structure

question:
Above Ground（AG）藥餌站安裝在什麼位置？
Where are Above-Ground (AG) bait stations installed?
options: 只在泥土中 Only in soil
在被保護結構內及在發現有白蟻活動的地方 On/in structure where termite activity found
只在屋頂 Only on roof

question:
出現以下哪種情況時可確定白蟻巢已被撲治？
When can colony elimination be determined?
options: 進食糧比之前減少 Decreased feeding
已沒有工蟻 No workers exist
經一段時間後已沒有進食 No feeding over measured period
以上全部 All of above

question:
液體化學治理方法需要在哪些地方鑽孔入藥？
Where should drilling and injection be done for liquid chemical treatment?
options: 所有地腳線、門框、地板周邊、固定櫥及洗滌盆、所有白蟻曾活動地方 All baseboards, doorframes, floor edges, cupboards & sinks, all active areas

question:
白蟻主要以什麼為食糧？
What is the main food source for termites?
options: 纖維素物料（木材、紙張） Cellulose materials (wood, paper)

question:
白蟻群體中數量最多的是哪一類？
Which caste has the largest number in a termite colony?

以下哪種木材最容易受到白蟻攻擊？
Which type of wood is most susceptible to termite attack?
options: 經過處理的防腐木材 Treated timber
與泥土接觸的濕木材 Damp wood in contact with soil

question:
白蟻分飛（Swarming）通常發生在什麼時候？
When does termite swarming usually occur?
options: 春季或夏季雨後 After rain in spring/summer
全年任何時間 Any time of year
只在夜間 Only at night

question:
白蟻的哪一個階級負責築造和修補蟻路？
Which termite caste builds and repairs mud tubes?

如果發現家中木地板有被白蟻破壞的跡象，第一步應該做什麼？
If termite damage is found on wooden floor at home, what should be done first?
options: 立即噴灑殺蟲劑 Immediately spray insecticide
不要騷擾，儘快聯絡專業滅蟲公司 Don't disturb, call professional ASAP
嘗試自行挖開地板 Try to dig open floor

question:
Sentricon 藥餌系統是由哪間公司生產的？
Which company manufactures the Sentricon system?

在進行白蟻治理時，為什麼不建議使用家用殺蟲劑噴灑？
Why is home-use insecticide spray NOT recommended for termite treatment?
options: 因為會驅散白蟻，導致擴散 Because it repels termites, causing spread
因為完全無效 Completely ineffective
因為會傷害人體 Harmful to humans

question:
以下哪項不是白蟻入侵的常見跡象？
Which is NOT a common sign of termite infestation?
options: 木製品被破壞 Damaged wood
很多蒼蠅飛繞 Many flies buzzing
發現白蟻翅膀 Discarded wings

question:
液體化學屏障治理白蟻的有效期一般為多長？
How long does a liquid chemical barrier for termite treatment typically last?

白蟻的哪一個階級具有飛行能力？
Which termite caste has flight capability?

白蟻在分飛後會做什麼？
What do termites do after swarming?
options: 立即返回舊巢 Return to old colony immediately
落地脫翅，尋找合適地方築新巢 Drop wings, find suitable place to build new nest
繼續飛行數天 Continue flying for days
死亡於空中 Die in mid-air

question:
以下哪種建築設計最有助於防止白蟻入侵？
Which building design best helps prevent termite invasion?
options: 木材直接接觸泥土 Wood directly touching soil
沒有木材與泥土接觸、良好的通風和排水 No wood-soil contact, good ventilation & drainage

question:
工蟻在白蟻群體中的主要功能是什麼？
What is the main function of workers in a termite colony?
options: 覓食、照顧其他成員、築設巢穴 Foraging, feeding members, nest building
指揮其他成員 Command others

question:
Dampwood 白蟻的糞粒有什麼特徵？
What is characteristic of Dampwood termite fecal pellets?
options: 沒有特定形狀 No specific shape

question:
以下哪種說法關於白蟻是正確的？
Which statement about termites is correct?
options: 白蟻是螞蟻的一種 Termites are a type of ant
白蟻與蟑螂較為接近 Termites are more closely related to cockroaches
白蟻只在熱帶地區生存 Termites only survive in tropics
白蟻不吃木材 Termites don't eat wood

question:
在香港，最常見造成木材破壞的白蟻是哪一種？
Which termite most commonly causes wood damage in Hong Kong?
options: 家白蟻（台灣乳白蟻） Formosan termite

question:
藥餌系統治理相比液體化學治理的主要優點是什麼？
What is the main advantage of baiting vs liquid chemical treatment?
options: 降低風險，沒有重複噴藥，針對整巢 Low risk, no repeated spraying, targets whole colony
更容易操作 Easier to operate

question:
白蟻治理後需要多少時間才能確認整巢撲治？
How long after treatment can colony elimination be confirmed?
options: 經一段時間（通常數月）沒有進食活動 No feeding activity over measured period (usually months)

question:
白蟻最喜歡的活動溫度是攝氏多少度？
What is the preferred temperature for termite activity?

白蟻泥路的厚度通常是多少？
How thick are termite mud tubes usually?
options: 像紙張一樣薄 As thin as paper
約鉛筆粗細 About pencil thickness
約手指粗細 About finger thickness
約手臂粗細 About arm thickness

question:
進行白蟻治理前，最重要的是什麼？
What is most important before termite treatment?
options: 直接噴灑殺蟲劑 Immediately spray pesticide
詳細巡查，找出所有活動範圍 Detailed inspection to find all activity areas

question:
Noviflumuron 如何影響白蟻？
How does Noviflumuron affect termites?
options: 攻擊神經系統 Attacks nervous system
控制幾丁質合成，導致蛻皮失敗 Controls chitin synthesis, causes failed molting

question:
白蟻群體內的飛蟻在什麼情況下會出現？
Under what conditions do alates appear in a termite colony?
options: 群體發展到4-5年，足夠大時 After 4-5 years when colony is large enough
群體只有數十天時 When colony is only tens of days old
只有冬季才會出現 Only appear in winter

question:
在治理白蟻時，Above Ground 藥餌站應該安裝在什麼位置？
Where should Above Ground bait stations be installed for termite treatment?
options: 在發現有白蟻活動的地方 In areas where termite activity is found

question:
白蟻可以在沒有食物來源的情況下存活多久？
How long can termites survive without a food source?
options: 超過一年 Over a year

question:
以下哪種建築材料對白蟻最有抵抗力？
Which building material is most resistant to termites?
options: 未經處理的木材 Untreated wood
經過防腐處理的木材或金屬/混凝土 Treated timber or metal/concrete

question:
白蟻的分飛活動通常在什麼時間發生？
When does termite swarming activity usually occur?
options: 黃昏或夜間 Dusk or nighttime

question:
藥餌系統中的纖維素有什麼作用？
What is the function of cellulose in the bait system?
options: 引誘白蟻進食，同時讓同伴找到藥餌位置 Attract termites to feed and let nestmates find bait

question:
白蟻會攻擊以下哪種材料？
Which material will termites attack?
options: 含有纖維素的木材和紙張 Cellulose-containing wood and paper

question:
在進行液體化學白蟻治理時，需要鑽孔的直徑通常是多少？
What is the typical drilling diameter for liquid termite treatment?

以下哪種情況表示白蟻治理成功？
Which situation indicates successful termite treatment?
options: 仍然見到少量工蟻 Still see some workers
經一段時間後已沒有進食活動，沒有工蟻 No feeding activity over time, no workers

question:
白蟻最活躍的季節是什麼時候？
When are termites most active?
options: 春季和夏季 Spring and summer
全年一樣 Equally active year-round

question:
以下哪項是預防白蟻入侵的最佳方法？
Which is the best method to prevent termite invasion?
options: 定期噴灑殺蟲劑 Regular pesticide spraying
消除木材與泥土接觸，保持通風乾燥 Remove wood-soil contact, keep ventilated and dry

question:
白蟻治理後，傢俱可以即時搬回嗎？
Can furniture be moved back immediately after termite treatment?
options: 需要等待藥劑完全乾燥 Need to wait for chemical to fully dry

question:
為什麼在巡查時聽到「嘀嘀」聲音很重要？
Why is hearing "tick tick" sound during inspection important?
options: 那只是噪音 It is just noise
那表示有白蟻兵蟻在附近活動 It indicates termite soldiers are active nearby

question:
以下哪種情況最容易引來白蟻入侵？
Which condition most attracts termite invasion?
options: 完全乾燥的地方 Completely dry area
木材與泥土接觸 Wood in contact with soil
經常有人走動的地方 High human traffic

question:
藥餌系統治理白蟻一般需要多長時間才能見效？
How long does baiting system termite treatment usually take to show results?

白蟻可以在沒有水源的情況下存活嗎？
Can termites survive without water?
options: 可以，存活數月 Yes, for several months
不可以，需要濕度 No, need moisture

question:
白蟻的哪一個生命階段最容易受到治理影響？
Which life stage of termites is most susceptible to treatment?

液體白蟻治理需要處理以下哪些位置？
Which locations need treatment in liquid termite control?
options: 所有地腳線、門框、地板周邊、固定櫥及所有可見白蟻活動區 All baseboards, doorframes, floor edges, cupboards & visible active areas

question:
以下哪種說法關於 Sentricon 是正確的？
Which statement about Sentricon is correct?
options: Sentricon 含有大量化學殺蟲劑 Sentricon contains large amount of chemical insecticide
Sentricon 透過昆蟲生長調節劑來控制白蟻 Sentricon uses insect growth regulator to control termites
Sentricon 只對工蟻有效 Sentricon only affects workers
Sentricon 需要每月重新噴灑 Sentricon needs monthly re-spraying
